title: Equals(Object) and GetHashCode() should be overridden in pairs
description: "Equals(Object)" and "GetHashCode()" should be overridden in pairsAnalyze your codeintentionality-completereliabilityBugcweWhy is this an issue?How can I fix it?More InfoSuppose you overrideObject.Equalsin a type, you must also overrideObject.GetHashCode. If two objects are equal according to theEqualsmethod, then callingGetHashCodeon each of them must yield the same integer. If this is not the case, many collections, such as aHashtableor aDictionarywon’t handle class instances correctly.In order to not have unpredictable behavior,EqualsandGetHashCodeshould be either both inherited, or both overridden.Available In:Catch issues on the fly,in your IDEDetect issues in your GitHub, Azure DevOps Services, Bitbucket Cloud, GitLab repositoriesAnalyze code in youron-premise CIAvailable Since9.1Ana
recommendation: Review and fix according to the rule guidelines.

logic.detection_conditions: Class has Equals(object) override without GetHashCode() override, or vice versa
logic.triggering_conditions: Class contains 'override bool Equals(object' XOR 'override int GetHashCode()'
logic.exclusion_conditions: Exclude test code, abstract classes, and classes with both methods
never_trigger_on: Classes with both Equals and GetHashCode overridden
logic.reasoning: Enforces that Equals(object) and GetHashCode() must be overridden together. If two objects are equal per Equals(), they must have the same hash code. Overriding only one breaks collections like Hashtable and Dictionary. Detects classes with 'override bool Equals(object)' but no 'override int GetHashCode()', or vice versa. Since this requires analyzing class-level method pairs, we search for the presence of one override pattern but not the other within ClassDeclaration source. This is a compound check using negative lookbehind concept.

should_trigger: public class Foo { public override bool Equals(object obj) { } }
public class Bar { public override int GetHashCode() { } }
public struct Data { public override bool Equals(object obj) { } }
should_not_trigger: public class Foo { public override bool Equals(object obj) { } public override int GetHashCode() { } }
public class Bar { private int value; }
public struct Data { public override bool Equals(object obj) { } public override int GetHashCode() { } }
